summary: First iteration: backend + frontend tested end-to-end. All 13 pytest tests passed (root, equipment catalog, auth invalid/no-token/valid, profile update, workout AI generate + get, workout logs, weight log + user.current_weight sync, goal progress, diet AI generate + current). Frontend Expo web preview loads login screen correctly and, after injecting the token into localStorage (RAW string, matching auth.tsx implementation), redirects to Home with 'Olá, Test', HIPERTROFIA goal card (80->85 kg, 12 semanas), all 4 shortcuts, and 4 working tabs (tab-home, tab-treinos, tab-nutricao, tab-progresso). Claude (claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY produced valid JSON for both workout and diet.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - RN Web deprecation, non-blocking.

action_items: Discrepância no request: o E1 mencionou salvar token como JSON.stringify('fj-test-token') (com aspas escapadas). No código real (src/auth.tsx linha 59), o token é gravado RAW via localStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY, token). Testado com valor RAW e funcionou. Se o E1 quiser padronizar com JSON.stringify, ajuste auth.tsx (getStoredToken/setStoredToken) para fazer JSON.parse/stringify. Do contrário, atualize a documentação.
Consider adding retry/backoff for Claude LLM calls (workout/diet generate) to reduce risk of transient 5xx.
Remove deprecated pointerEvents prop usage to silence RN Web warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py get_current_user (line 169) uses a dict-comprehension with 'k in user or True' which always passes — not a bug but harmless overkill; could be simplified to User(**{k: user.get(k) for k in User.model_fields.keys()}).
auth/google endpoint upserts on session_token so re-login re-uses tokens correctly. Sessions have 7-day expiry stored as ISO string; parser in get_current_user handles both str and datetime — good.
goal/progress protects against divide-by-zero when start==target — good.
server.py is 610 lines; approaching the 700 threshold. Consider splitting into routers (auth, workout, diet, weight, goal) if it grows further.
seed_data_creation: Test user (user_id=test_user_1, email=TEST_user1@example.com) + session_token=fj-test-token were created in test_database via pytest fixture with autouse=True. Cleanup ran after suite completed. Data re-seeded manually for frontend test and cleaned afterwards. DB left in clean state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://body-transform-fit-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend .env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). To test authed frontend, inject localStorage 'fj_session_token' as RAW string (NOT JSON.stringify) — the auth.tsx implementation reads/writes raw. Seed a matching user+session in test_database.users and test_database.user_sessions. All tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py are self-contained (create+clean via fixture).
